title: Database connection pool exhausted
description: PostgreSQL connection pool hit max limit of 100. Applications throwing connection timeout errors.
root_cause: Slow queries holding connections. Missing index on orders.created_at
resolution: Added index, increased pool size to 200, killed long-running queries

title: Memory leak in user-service
description: user-service pod memory climbing steadily. OOMKilled after hitting 2GB limit.
root_cause: Unclosed HTTP client sessions in async handlers
resolution: Patched session cleanup, rolled deployment, added memory alert at 80%

title: Redis cache eviction causing DB overload
description: Redis maxmemory policy evicting keys during traffic spike. All requests hitting Postgres.
root_cause: Redis memory undersized for peak load
resolution: Increased Redis memory, switched policy, added cache warming

title: SSL certificate expiry on payments gateway
description: payments.example.com SSL cert expired. Checkout flow broken for all users.
root_cause: Certificate renewal cron job failed silently
resolution: Renewed cert manually, fixed cron, added expiry alerts

title: Kafka consumer lag spike
description: Notifications consumer group lag reached 2M messages. Push notifications delayed 4 hours.
resolution: Added circuit breaker, scaled consumer replicas from 2 to 8
